title: Dump assembly for vehicle
abstract: A dump assembly for a vehicle. The dump assembly includes a rail box configured to be mounted to the vehicle. A dump body is attached to the rail box. The dump body extends along a longitudinal axis and includes a floor plate having a plurality of interconnected curved sections. A stiffener is configured to reinforce the dump body. The stiffener is shaped to mimic the shape of the interconnected curved sections.
claims:
Claims 1. A dump assembly for a vehicle comprising; a rail box configured to be mounted to the vehicle; a dump body attached to the rail box, the dump body extending along a longitudinal axis and including a floor plate having a plurality of interconnected curved sections; and a stiffener configured to reinforce the dump body, the stiffener being shaped to mimic the shape of the interconnected curved sections. 2. The dump assembly according to claim 1 , wherein a longitudinal axis of the stiffener extends substantially perpendicular to the longitudinal axis of the dump body. 3. The dump assembly according to claim 1, wherein the plurality of interconnected curved sections are configured to give the dump body a substantially W-shaped cross section. 4. The dump assembly according to claim 1 , wherein the stiffener includes at least one plate. 5. The dump assembly according to claim 1 , wherein the stiffener includes a plate having an edge that is in substantially continuous, uninterrupted contact with the plurality of interconnected curved sections of the floor plate. 6 The dump assembly according to claim 1 , wherein the rail box is provided with a tunnel portion, the stiffener extending through the tunnel portion. 7. The dump assembly according to claim 1 , wherein the tunnel portion is provided with a reinforcement plate configured to reinforce the rail box in the area of the tunnel portion. 8. The dump assembly according to claim 4, wherein the at least three plates are interconnected to form a U-shaped cross section. 9. The assembly according to claim 1, wherein the dump assembly includes a plurality of stiffeners spaced along the longitudinal axis of the dump body. 10. The assembly according to claim 2 including two rail boxes, the longitudinal axis of the dump body being located approximately midway between a first of the two rail boxes and a second of the two rail boxes in a direction extending transverse to the longitudinal axis of the dump body. 11. The dump assembly according to claim 1 including a plurality of wear plates secured to the floor plate. 12. A dump assembly for a vehicle comprising: a rail box configured to be mounted to the vehicle, the rail box having a tunnel portion; a dump body attached to the rail box, the dump body extending along a longitudinal axis and including a floor plate having a plurality of interconnected curved section; and a stiffener configured to reinforce the dump body, the stiffener extending through the tunnel portion of the rail box in a direction extending transverse to the longitudinal axis of the dump body. 13. The dump assembly according to claim 12, wherein the stiffener is shaped to mimic the shape of the interconnected curved sections of the floor plate. 14. The dump assembly according to claim 12, wherein the stiffener includes a plate having an edge that is in substantially continuous, uninterrupted contact with the plurality of interconnected curved sections of the floor plate. 15. The dump assembly according to claim 12, wherein the plurality of interconnected curved sections are configured to give the dump body a substantially W-shaped cross section. 16. A dump assembly for a vehicle comprising; a rail box configured to be mounted to the vehicle, a dump body attached to the rail box, the dump body extending along a longitudinal axis and including a floor plate having a plurality of interconnected curved sections; and a stiffener configured to reinforce the dump body, the stiffener including a plate having an edge that is in substantially continuous, uninterrupted contact with the plurality of interconnected curved sections of the floor plate. 17. The dump assembly according to claim 16, wherein the rail box includes a tunnel portion, the stiffener extending through the tunnel portion of the rail box in a direction extending transverse to the longitudinal axis of the dump body. 18. The dump assembly according to claim 16, wherein the plurality of interconnected curved sections are configured to give the dump body a substantially W-shaped cross section. 19. The dump body according to claim 17, wherein the tunnel portion is provided with a reinforcement plate configured to reinforce the rail box in the area of the tunnel portion. 20. A dump assembly for an off-highway vehicle, comprising a) a dump body having a W-shaped profile; b) a support structure for the dump body, the support structure comprising: i) a plurality of spaced apart stiffeners extending perpendicular to a longitudinal axis of the dump body, each of the plurality of stiffeners including at least three plates and having a W-shaped profile that corresponds to the W-shaped profile of the dump body, an edge of each of the plurality of stiffeners being substantially in continuous, uninterrupted contact with the dump body; and ii) a plurality of rail boxes extending parallel to the longitudinal axis of the dump body, each of the plurality of stiffeners including at least one tunnel portion through which one of the plurality of stiffeners 

 extend, the at least one tunnel portion being provided with at least one reinforcement plate; a plurality of wear plates secured to the dump body, the wear plates being arranged to follow the W-shaped profile of the dump body.
